because.text: Accepted in full. ADR-004: criterion answered 'none exists' via the same node-CAS transitive-closure argument as Kimi; Codex's Option 1 explicitly engaged and rejected; s1.1 replacement text recorded as leading normative candidate. ADR-005: criterion answered decisively for R2 - FALSE = APPLY(K,I) is a subterm of any SKI-compiled boolean logic, so R1 would make every such compound term wave-silent (invisible to Mass routing and Gravity discovery); maintainer moves from undecided to leaning R2. Both proposed vectors verified: WV-ITERATED-DECAY-6560 reproduced exactly against the oracle (interfere({0,6560,0}, self) = {0,657,-256}); WV-FALSE-R2-PIN definitional under R2. Zero dissent among criterion-engaged reviews so far.

subject.note: Gemini 3.1 Pro ADR-004/005 gate review (ADR-004 gate 2/>=3 Option 2; ADR-005 gate 1/>=3 R2 + absent base case)
